'''Sosio Kakra''' was a small, [[Color/Legends|white-skinned]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] present at [[Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina/Legends|Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina]] in [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]] who assisted [[Ackmena/Legends|Ackmena]].<ref name="The Star Wars Holiday Special Cantina: Who's Who" />
